title: Design System: Fresh Water Market OS

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Standard ease-out for hover and scroll-in transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main Order action across the customer experience.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; background: #0b5284; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 16px; text-decoration: none; transition: background .2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #094468; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0b5284; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: WhatsApp Button
components.description: Secondary contact action. Distinct emerald, never larger than the primary Order button.
components.css: .ds-btn-whatsapp { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; background: #059669; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 16px; text-decoration: none; transition: background .2s; } .ds-btn-whatsapp:hover { background: #047857; }

components.name: Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 16px; background: #dcf6f9; color: #0b5284; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(11,82,132,0.1); }

components.name: Quick Order Card
components.description: Full-card clickable service action with photo, price hint, and arrow.
components.html:
Water Refill

Bring your containers, fill up fresh.

From P1.60/LOrder now →
components.css: .ds-quick-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,0.08); text-decoration: none; color: #191f2f; transition: box-shadow .2s, transform .2s; } .ds-quick-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(15,23,42,0.12); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-quick-media { height: 120px; background: linear-gradient(135deg,#dcf6f9,#bae6fd); } .ds-quick-body { padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-quick-body h3 { font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.0625rem; } .ds-quick-price { color: #0b5284; font-weight: 700; font-size: .875rem; } .ds-quick-cta { margin-top: 8px; color: #0b5284; font-weight: 700; font-size: .875rem; }

narrative.overview: Fresh Water Market is a real Gaborone water business. The interface should feel like a trusted local counter: fast, plain-spoken, useful. Confidence comes from clarity and speed, not spectacle. It rejects the AI-landing-page playbook (cream backgrounds, uppercase eyebrows, numbered markers, full-screen scroll-snap, floating particles) and generic SaaS chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Mobile-first, app-like density — compact sections, no cavernous white space.
Deep ocean blue as the single brand anchor; teal and aqua as cool supporting tones.
Motion is a response to interaction, never a first-paint performance.
Real product photography over dark image overlays.

rules.name: The One Warm Accent Rule
rules.body: Signal Orange appears on ≤10% of any screen and is never a section background.

rules.name: The No Cream Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds are white or cool-tinted aqua. Warm cream/beige/sand/parchment are forbidden.

rules.name: The Weight-Not-Family Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is built from Inter weights, never a second font family.

rules.name: The Slogan-Is-Support Rule
rules.body: 'Stay Fresh. Stay Hydrated.' is a supporting slogan; the H1 states the concrete offer.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat by default; shadow appears only as a response to state.

dos: Do keep the page background white or cool-tinted aqua.
Do make the hero state the concrete offer and keep the slogan small.
Do show real product photos brightly; prefer product cards over dark overlays.
Do use next/image with proper sizes and priority only on the hero image.
Do keep sections compact and useful.
Do restrict motion to hover, tap, and a single cheap scroll-in fade.
Do reserve Signal Orange for a single most-popular/price emphasis per screen.
donts: Don't add uppercase tracked eyebrows or numbered section markers.
Don't add floating particles, constant float animations, or first-paint entrance animations.
Don't bury product photography under near-black gradient overlays.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard chrome or the hero-metric template.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders or gradient text.
Don't let WhatsApp/assistant compete with or out-size the primary Order action.
